title: Use default software delivery surface
reason: The v1 contract should keep the software product default delivery surface so repository contract tests continue to validate the root planning contract as the canonical default fixture.
proposed_changes: Change delivery_surfaces from cli plus document to the default software surface cli.
Keep product-type and delivery-surface planning guidance covered by REQ-008 and docs/plan without widening the root contract fixture.
risk_impact: No scope reduction; this preserves deterministic product-type guidance while avoiding a fixture-specific surface mismatch.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because all accepted capabilities, requirements, evaluations, and mitigations are unchanged.
